framework.name: ISO 27001-based Security Standard for Danish State Authorities
framework.scope: Mandatory information security standard for all Danish state authorities, based on ISO 27001 Annex A controls adapted for Danish government context
framework.structure_description: Organized by ISO 27001:2013 Annex A domains (A.5 through A.18), with each control adapted for the Danish government context. All controls are mandatory for statslige myndigheder.

controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.description: A set of information security policies must be defined, approved by management, and communicated to all employees.
controls.description_nl: Et saet af politikker for informationssikkerhed skal defineres, godkendes af ledelsen og kommunikeres til alle medarbejdere.
controls.implementation_guidance: Udarbejd overordnet sikkerhedspolitik og emnespecifikke politikker. Ledelsen skal godkende og underskrive.

controls.title: Review of security policies
controls.description: Information security policies must be reviewed at planned intervals or when significant changes occur.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhedspolitikkerne skal gennemgas med planlagte intervaller eller ved vaesentlige aendringer.

controls.title: Roles and responsibilities
controls.description: All information security responsibilities must be defined and assigned.
controls.description_nl: Alle ansvarsomrader for informationssikkerhed skal defineres og tildeles.
controls.implementation_guidance: Udpeg en informationssikkerhedsansvarlig (CISO) og definer ansvarsmatrice.

controls.title: Segregation of duties
controls.description: Conflicts between tasks and responsibilities must be identified and prevented.
controls.description_nl: Konflikter mellem opgaver og ansvarsomrader skal identificeres og forebygges.

controls.title: Contact with authorities
controls.description: Appropriate contacts with relevant authorities, including CFCS and the Data Protection Authority, must be maintained.
controls.description_nl: Passende kontakter med relevante myndigheder, herunder CFCS og Datatilsynet, skal vedligeholdes.

controls.title: Information security in project management
controls.description: Information security must be addressed in project management regardless of project type.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhed skal adresseres i projektledelse uanset projekttype.

controls.title: Screening
controls.description: Background checks of all candidates for employment must be conducted in accordance with applicable laws.
controls.description_nl: Baggrundskontrol af alle kandidater til ansaettelse skal gennemfores i overensstemmelse med gaeldende love.

controls.title: Terms of employment
controls.description: Contractual agreements with employees must state their and the organization responsibilities for information security.
controls.description_nl: Kontraktmaessige aftaler med medarbejdere skal angive deres og organisationens ansvar for informationssikkerhed.

controls.title: Awareness and training
controls.description: All employees and relevant contractors must receive appropriate awareness and training in information security.
controls.description_nl: Alle medarbejdere og relevante kontrahenter skal modtage passende bevidstgorelse og uddannelse i informationssikkerhed.

controls.title: Disciplinary process
controls.description: There must be a formal and communicated disciplinary process for employees who breach the security policy.
controls.description_nl: Der skal vaere en formel og kommunikeret disciplinaer proces for medarbejdere der overtreeder sikkerhedspolitikken.

controls.title: Responsibilities at termination
controls.description: Information security responsibilities that remain valid after termination must be defined and communicated.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhedsansvar der forbliver gyldige efter fratradelse skal defineres og kommunikeres.

controls.title: Inventory of assets
controls.description: Information and other assets associated with information processing must be identified and an inventory maintained.
controls.description_nl: Information og andre aktiver forbundet med informationsbehandling skal identificeres og en fortegnelse vedligeholdes.

controls.title: Classification of information
controls.description: Information must be classified according to legal requirements, value, criticality, and sensitivity.
controls.description_nl: Information skal klassificeres i henhold til lovkrav, vaerdi, kritikalitet og folsomhed.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend dansk klassifikationsmodel: FORTROLIG, INTERN, OFFENTLIG.

controls.title: Labelling of information
controls.description: An appropriate set of procedures for labelling information must be developed in accordance with the classification scheme.
controls.description_nl: Et passende saet af procedurer for maerkning af information skal udvikles i overensstemmelse med klassifikationsskemaet.

controls.title: Handling of assets
controls.description: Procedures for handling assets must be developed in accordance with the classification scheme.
controls.description_nl: Procedurer for handtering af aktiver skal udvikles i overensstemmelse med klassifikationsskemaet.

controls.title: Access control policy
controls.description: An access control policy must be established, documented, and reviewed based on business and security requirements.
controls.description_nl: En adgangskontrolpolitik skal etableres, dokumenteres og gennemgas baseret pa forretnings- og sikkerhedskrav.

controls.title: User registration and deregistration
controls.description: A formal user registration and deregistration process must be implemented to enable assignment of access rights.
controls.description_nl: En formel proces for brugerregistrering og afregistrering skal implementeres for at muliggore tildeling af adgangsrettigheder.

controls.title: Management of privileged access rights
controls.description: Allocation and use of privileged access rights must be restricted and controlled.
controls.description_nl: Tildeling og brug af privilegerede adgangsrettigheder skal begraenses og kontrolleres.

controls.title: Password policy
controls.description: There must be a password policy with requirements for length, complexity, and change frequency.
controls.description_nl: Der skal vaere en adgangskodepolitik med krav til laengde, kompleksitet og udskiftningsfrekvens.
controls.implementation_guidance: Mindst 12 tegn, kompleksitetskrav, ingen genbrug af de seneste 10 adgangskoder.

controls.title: Review of user access rights
controls.description: Asset owners must review user access rights at regular intervals.
controls.description_nl: Ejere af aktiver skal gennemga brugeradgangsrettigheder med regelmaeessige intervaller.

controls.title: Policy on use of cryptography
controls.description: A policy for the use of cryptographic controls for the protection of information must be developed and implemented.
controls.description_nl: Der skal udvikles og implementeres en politik for brug af kryptografiske kontroller til beskyttelse af information.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvend AES-256 for data i hvile og TLS 1.2+ for data i transit.

controls.title: Key management
controls.description: A policy on the use, protection, and lifetime of cryptographic keys must be developed and implemented.
controls.description_nl: En politik for brug, beskyttelse og levetid af kryptografiske noegler skal udvikles og implementeres.

controls.title: Physical security perimeters
controls.description: Security perimeters must be defined and used to protect areas containing sensitive information.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedsomrader skal defineres og anvendes til at beskytte omrader der indeholder folsom information.

controls.title: Physical entry controls
controls.description: Secure areas must be protected by appropriate entry controls to ensure only authorized personnel gain access.
controls.description_nl: Sikre omrader skal beskyttes af passende adgangskontroller for at sikre, at kun autoriseret personale far adgang.

controls.title: Protection against external threats
controls.description: Physical protection against natural disasters, malicious attacks, or accidents must be designed and applied.
controls.description_nl: Fysisk beskyttelse mod naturkatastrofer, ondsindede angreb eller ulykker skal designes og anvendes.

controls.title: Equipment security
controls.description: Equipment must be sited and protected to reduce risks from environmental threats and unauthorized access.
controls.description_nl: Udstyr skal placeres og beskyttes for at reducere risici fra miljoetrusler og uautoriseret adgang.

controls.title: Documented operating procedures
controls.description: Operating procedures must be documented and made available to all users who need them.
controls.description_nl: Driftsprocedurer skal dokumenteres og goeres tilgaeengelige for alle brugere der har behov herfor.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: Changes to the organization, business processes, and IT systems must be controlled.
controls.description_nl: Aendringer til organisationen, forretningsprocesser og IT-systemer skal kontrolleres.

controls.title: Capacity management
controls.description: The use of resources must be monitored and tuned, and projections must be made of future capacity requirements.
controls.description_nl: Brugen af ressourcer skal overrages og justeres, og der skal foretages fremskrivninger af fremtidige kapacitetsbehov.

controls.title: Protection against malware
controls.description: Detection, prevention, and recovery controls against malware must be implemented combined with awareness.
controls.description_nl: Detektions-, forebyggelses- og gendannelseskontroller mod malware skal implementeres kombineret med bevidstgorelse.

controls.title: Backup
controls.description: Backup copies of information, software, and system images must be taken and tested regularly.
controls.description_nl: Backupkopier af information, software og systembilleder skal tages og testes regelmaeessigt.

controls.title: Logging
controls.description: Event logs recording user activities, exceptions, and information security events must be produced and kept.
controls.description_nl: Haendelseslogger der registrerer brugeraktiviteter, undtagelser og informationssikkerhedshaendelser skal oprettes og opbevares.
controls.implementation_guidance: Centraliser logindsamling. Opbevar logdata i mindst 12 maneder.

controls.title: Vulnerability management
controls.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities must be obtained in a timely fashion, and appropriate measures must be taken.
controls.description_nl: Information om tekniske sarbarheder skal indhentes rettidigt, og passende foranstaltninger skal traeffes.

controls.title: Network security management
controls.description: Networks must be managed and controlled to protect information in systems and applications.
controls.description_nl: Netvaerk skal styres og kontrolleres for at beskytte information i systemer og applikationer.

controls.title: Network segregation
controls.description: Groups of information services, users, and systems must be segregated on networks.
controls.description_nl: Grupper af informationstjenester, brugere og systemer skal segmenteres pa netvaerk.

controls.title: Information transfer
controls.description: Formal transfer policies, procedures, and controls must be in place to protect the transfer of information.
controls.description_nl: Formelle overforselspolititikker, procedurer og kontroller skal vaere pa plads for at beskytte overforsel af information.

controls.title: Security requirements for information systems
controls.description: Information security related requirements must be included in the requirements for new information systems.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhedsrelaterede krav skal medtages i kravene til nye informationssystemer.

controls.title: Secure development lifecycle
controls.description: Rules for the development of software and systems must be established and applied to developments within the organization.
controls.description_nl: Regler for udvikling af software og systemer skal etableres og anvendes pa udviklinger i organisationen.

controls.title: Security testing
controls.description: Security testing must be conducted during development and before production deployment.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedstest skal gennemfores under udvikling og for produktionsudrulning.

controls.title: Protection of test data
controls.description: Test data must be carefully selected, protected, and controlled. Production data must not be used uncritically as test data.
controls.description_nl: Testdata skal vaelges omhyggeligt, beskyttes og kontrolleres. Produktionsdata ma ikke anvendes ukritisk som testdata.

controls.title: Information security in supplier relationships
controls.description: Requirements for mitigating risks associated with supplier access to the organization assets must be agreed upon and documented.
controls.description_nl: Krav til reduktion af risici forbundet med leverandorers adgang til organisationens aktiver skal aftales og dokumenteres.

controls.title: Supplier service management
controls.description: Delivery of services from suppliers must be monitored, reviewed, and audited regularly.
controls.description_nl: Levering af tjenester fra leverandoerer skal overrages, gennemgas og auditeres regelmaeessigt.

controls.title: Supply chain security
controls.description: Agreements with suppliers must include requirements for information security throughout the supply chain.
controls.description_nl: Aftaler med leverandoerer skal indeholde krav om informationssikkerhed i hele forsyningskaeden.

controls.title: Incident management process
controls.description: Management responsibilities and procedures must be established to ensure a quick, effective, and orderly response to information security incidents.
controls.description_nl: Ledelsesansvar og -procedurer skal etableres for at sikre hurtig, effektiv og ordnet respons pa informationssikkerhedshaendelser.

controls.title: Reporting of incidents
controls.description: Information security incidents must be reported through appropriate channels as quickly as possible.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhedshaendelser skal rapporteres via passende kanaler sa hurtigt som muligt.

controls.title: Assessment and decision
controls.description: Information security events must be assessed and a decision made on classification.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhedshaendelser skal vurderes, og der skal traeffes beslutning om klassifikation.

controls.title: Response to incidents
controls.description: Information security incidents must be responded to in accordance with the documented procedures.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhedshaendelser skal handteres i overensstemmelse med de dokumenterede procedurer.

controls.title: Learning from incidents
controls.description: Knowledge gained from analyzing and resolving information security incidents must be used to reduce future incidents.
controls.description_nl: Viden opnaet fra analyse og losning af informationssikkerhedshaendelser skal bruges til at reducere fremtidige haendelser.

controls.title: Information security continuity
controls.description: Information security continuity must be embedded in the organization business continuity management system.
controls.description_nl: Informationssikkerhedskontinuitet skal indarbejdes i organisationens beredskabsstyringsystem.

controls.title: IT contingency plan
controls.description: IT contingency plans must be documented, implemented, and tested to ensure appropriate availability.
controls.description_nl: IT-beredskabsplaner skal dokumenteres, implementeres og testes for at sikre passende tilgaeengelighed.

controls.title: Redundancy
controls.description: Information processing facilities must be implemented with sufficient redundancy to meet availability requirements.
controls.description_nl: Informationsbehandlingsfaciliteter skal implementeres med tilstraekkelig redundans til at opfylde tilgaeengelighedskrav.

controls.title: Legal and contractual requirements
controls.description: All relevant legal, regulatory, and contractual requirements must be identified, documented, and kept up to date.
controls.description_nl: Alle relevante lovmaessige, regulatoriske og kontraktmaessige krav skal identificeres, dokumenteres og holdes opdateret.

controls.title: Protection of personal data
controls.description: Privacy and protection of personal data must be ensured in accordance with relevant legislation.
controls.description_nl: Privatlivets fred og beskyttelse af personoplysninger skal sikres i overensstemmelse med relevant lovgivning.

controls.title: Independent review of information security
controls.description: The organization approach to managing information security must be independently reviewed.
controls.description_nl: Organisationens tilgang til styring af informationssikkerhed skal underkastes uafhaeengig gennemgang.

controls.title: Compliance with security policies and standards
controls.description: Managers must regularly review compliance with information security policies and standards.
controls.description_nl: Ledere skal regelmaeessigt gennemga overensstemmelse med informationssikkerhedspolitikker og -standarder.

metadata.source: Statens ISO 27001 standard (compiled from published guidance)
